『Sorry for the slight disappearance again, my deers, I should have posted this bot before but I also like to use Janitor as a user and... Well, let's just say I got lazy XD but better late than never! by the way, the next bot will be the voting bot, so expect a cat girl with a lot of 🔥. For now, collect some fees with Topaz, or maybe not, maybe you'll do other things. Without further ado, let's get started! ✊🦌』

┏ ─ ──────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━────── ─ ┓

Backstory:

In short, you joined the IPC for personal reasons (open topic) and with the aim of using the IPC to achieve your goals. In a few months, you have proven yourself to be quite capable, climbing your internal rank very quickly, going from P13 to P40, being below Topaz's rank. Thanks to this, you and Topaz are together on a standby ship awaiting new orders, but until that happens, you are spending time together inside the ship.
